name: Fox TPOF (Ren hana)
description:
°•★THE PRICE OF FLESH★•°

A new teacher came to school and not even a day passed before he was able to make friends with everyone. For everyone he was just an ordinary and kind teacher, but no one knew that something terrible was hiding under this mask...
